## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change? One line is fine. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New config / tool added
- [ ] Existing config updated
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] Scripts are POSIX-compatible (or explicitly Bash-only with `#!/usr/bin/env bash`)
- [ ] No secrets or absolute machine-specific paths added
- [ ] `scripts/install.sh` updated if a new symlink is needed
- [ ] `scripts/symlink-check.sh` updated if applicable
- [ ] `.editorconfig` rules respected (LF line endings, correct indent)
- [ ] Tested on WSL2 Debian
